description_long: This is a retro-style, two-door refrigerator with a matte reddish-pink exterior. The upper compartment is smaller, likely a freezer, and features a metallic handle on the left and a small yellow sticky note attached to the door. The lower compartment is larger, also with a vertical metallic handle on the left, and both handles are straight and protruding. The right side of the refrigerator is plain, while the back features a rectangular metallic vent or grille near the bottom. The overall shape is boxy with slightly rounded edges, and the surface appears smooth and hard, typical of enameled or powder-coated metal appliances.
description: A retro, reddish-pink two-door refrigerator with metallic handles and a small sticky note on the freezer door. The back features a metallic vent, and the surface is smooth and matte.
description_view_0: Front view showing both doors, metallic handles, and a sticky note on the upper door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, unadorned side and the profile of the protruding handles.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a rectangular metallic vent or grille at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain side and the profile of the handles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Straight, metallic, protruding vertical handles mounted on the left side of each door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular metallic vent with horizontal slats located at the lower back.
